title: KandyToys 16" Kids Mini Complete Skateboard - Childrens Beginner Skate Board with ABEC 5 Smooth Roll Bearings
features: Double kick children's beginner skateboard with black grip tape for that classic look, and to help learners keep their feet on the board.
The deck measures 16.5 x 5 inches 6 Fun, brightly coloured designs any skater would love.
7 Ply Wooden Board to provide a sturdy surface ideal for beginners.
Good quality ABEC-5 Bearings to ensure a smooth ride.
6 assorted styles. 1 sent at random. Max weight 20kg.
description: Children's beginner double kick skateboard with black grip tape for that classic skateboard look and to keep feet from slipping. The deck measures 16.5 x 6 inches with an assortment of 6 designs any budding skater would love. 7 ply wooden board provides a sturdy surface ideal for beginners, with ABEC-5 bearings for a smooth ride. Always use safety gear; Max Weight 20 KG
